shortDescription: Bright and airy 2-bedroom detached home in the heart of The Annex, move-in ready with generous lot.
fullDescription: Welcome to 15 Lowther Avenue in the vibrant The Annex neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. The sleeping quarters comprise 2 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Modern eat-in kitchen with stainless steel appliances
Minutes to parks, shops, and restaurants
Cosy living room with gas fireplace
